title: Sass & Belle Elephant Bamboo Spoons - Set of 3
features: Dimensions: L12.5 x W0.5 x H3.5 cm
description: Bring a touch of nature to mealtime with our set of three elephant spoons. Made from 100% planet-friendly bamboo, you'll find an adorable design of our jungle friend. A brilliant way to wave goodbye to single-use plastic and have fun at the same time. This item has been hand-polished and crafted from natural bamboo which may cause subtle variations in the colour and engraving, making each one beautifully unique.
